The '''Attack tank''' was a wheeled assault vehicle, the design of which very closely resembled that of the [[HAVw A5 Juggernaut]], which was utilized by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. While the A5 had a boxy appearance, the attack tank possessed more rounded edges.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
